testcase.name: deveRetornarPendenteQuandoGatewayFalharNaRequisicao
testcase.system-out: 16:54:10.132 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1] ERROR br.com.gestrest.pagamento.service.adapters.out.integration.PaymentGatewayAdapter -- Erro na chamada ao procpag para pagamento: 1 org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException: erro de conexao at org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.postForObject(RestTemplate.java:515) at br.com.gestrest.pagamento.service.adapters.out.integration.PaymentGatewayAdapter.lambda$1(PaymentGatewayAdapter.java:68) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.doExec(ForkJoinTask.java:387) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool$WorkQueue.topLevelExec(ForkJoinPool.java:1312) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.scan(ForkJoinPool.java:1843) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool.runWorker(ForkJoinPool.java:1808) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinWorkerThread.run(ForkJoinWorkerThread.java:188) 16:54:10.169 [main] WARN br.com.gestrest.pagamento.service.adapters.out.integration.PaymentGatewayAdapter -- Timeout ou erro ao iniciar pagamento (sync wrapper). pagamentoId=1, pedidoId=1, error=org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException: erro de conexao 16:54:10.171 [main] ERROR br.com.gestrest.pagamento.service.adapters.out.integration.PaymentGatewayAdapter -- Fallback acionado para pagamento pendente. pagamentoId=1, pedidoId=1, usuarioId=1 org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException: erro de conexao at org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.postForObject(RestTemplate.java:515) at br.com.gestrest.pagamento.service.adapters.out.integration.PaymentGatewayAdapter.lambda$1(PaymentGatewayAdapter.java:68) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncSupply.run(CompletableFuture.java:1768) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$AsyncSupply.exec(CompletableFuture.java:1760) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinTask.doExec(ForkJoinTask.java:387) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinPool$WorkQueue.topLevelExec(ForkJoinPool.java:1312) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ForkJoinWorkerThread.run(ForkJoinWorkerThread.java:188)

testcase.name: deveRetornarSucessoQuandoProcpagResponderComSucesso
testcase.system-out: 16:54:10.248 [ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1] INFO br.com.gestrest.pagamento.service.adapters.out.integration.PaymentGatewayAdapter -- Pagamento procpag para pagamento 1: status sucesso
